---
## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule (include rule ID)
- [ ] New command / feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Testing
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Tested manually (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] No em dashes (--) in any user-facing text
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Error messages are actionable
